# Genome Browser Vendor Assets

These files are browser UMD builds used by `interface/static/genome_browser/index.html`.

- `react.production.min.js`: `https://unpkg.com/react@18/umd/react.production.min.js`
- `react-dom.production.min.js`: `https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18/umd/react-dom.production.min.js`
- `react-linear-genome-view.umd.production.min.js`: `https://unpkg.com/@jbrowse/react-linear-genome-view/dist/react-linear-genome-view.umd.production.min.js`

They keep the Genome Browser page usable without a frontend build step or runtime CDN access.
